name: Waseco Resources Inc.
summary: Waseco Resources Inc., an exploration stage company, engages in the acquisition and exploration of mineral properties. It mainly explores for gold deposit. The company holds interest in the Battle Mountain Ridge project with 29 claims located in Lander County, Nevada. It also holds interests in exploration prospects located in Quebec, Canada; and holds 5% interest in a diamond exploration project located in the Attawapiskat region of Northern Ontario. Waseco Resources Inc. is based in Toronto, Canada.
